from myapp.services.payment import PaymentProcessor
from myapp.services.inventory import InventoryManager
from myapp.services.analytics import AnalyticsEngine
from myapp.services.export import ReportExporter


def process_order(order_id, processor: PaymentProcessor, manager: InventoryManager):
    processor.charge(order_id)
    manager.reserve(order_id)


def build_report(user_id, engine: AnalyticsEngine, exporter: ReportExporter):
    data = engine.compute(user_id)
    return exporter.to_pdf(data)


def handle_webhook(event, notifier, email_service):
    notifier.notify(event)
    email_service.send_alert(event)


def sync_user_data(user_id, crm, cache):
    data = crm.fetch(user_id)
    cache.set(f"user:{user_id}", data)
